evolution_quality_check.h1e_rationale: Cell-type mutation to IPF fibroblasts/MSCs where H3K27me3 bivalency is biologically plausible (Tayler 2026: KDM6B in MSC osteogenesis; IPF fibroblasts retain progenitor marks)
evolution_quality_check.h5e_rationale: Quantitative threshold prediction (condensate radius > spatial gap) distinguishes from eRNA/transcription factory alternatives; IDR-deleted YAP is clean condensate-specific control

evolved_hypotheses.title: KDM6B-Mediated Bivalent Mechanoenhancer Resolution as Epigenetic Ratchet in IPF Fibrosis
evolved_hypotheses.confidence_change_rationale: Grounding improved (KDM6B-stiffness connection via Tayler 2026, Yu 2025); but bivalent marks at mechanoenhancers specifically in IPF = inferred, not confirmed
evolved_hypotheses.core_claim: In cells retaining epigenetic plasticity (IPF fibroblasts, MSCs), a subset of mechanoenhancers carries bivalent chromatin (H3K4me1+H3K27me3) on soft ECM. ECM stiffening activates KDM6B, converting bivalent mechanoenhancers to active state (H3K4me1+H3K27ac). This represents an irreversible 'epigenetic ratchet' distinct from reversible YAP nuclear translocation in terminally differentiated cells.
evolved_hypotheses.mechanistic_chain: ECM stiffness (>10 kPa) → cytoskeletal tension → KDM6B nuclear enrichment → H3K27me3 demethylation at bivalent mechanoenhancers → EP300 recruitment → H3K27ac deposition → fibrotic gene activation
evolved_hypotheses.primary_prediction: H3K27me3 detectable at Cosgrove 2025 mechanoenhancer subset in IPF fibroblasts on soft ECM; lost on stiff ECM coinciding with KDM6B; KDM6B knockdown on stiff ECM maintains H3K27me3 at bivalent subset; NORMAL fibroblasts show NO H3K27me3 at same loci (cell-type specificity control)
evolved_hypotheses.internal_control: IPF vs normal lung fibroblasts on same stiffness gradient — if bivalent marks are IPF-specific, KDM6B-dependence is also IPF-specific

grounded_claims.claim: KDM6B activated by ECM stiffness/stress relaxation
ECM stiffness → KDM6B upregulation → H3K27me3 demethylation → EMT genes
KDM6B demethylates H3K27me3 at bivalent enhancers to drive differentiation
grounded_claims.source: KDM6B/JMJD3 literature (Bernstein 2006 Cell + enhancer activation literature)

grounded_claims.claim: IPF fibroblasts retain bivalent marks at mechanoenhancers
grounded_claims.source: [INFERRED] — plausible given dedifferentiation in IPF; requires CUT&RUN verification

evolved_hypotheses.therapeutic_significance: KDM6B inhibition (GSK-J4) in IPF could block ECM-stiffness-driven fibrotic gene activation in IPF fibroblasts without affecting mechanosensing in normal cells (no bivalent mechanoenhancer substrate)
what_changed_vs_original: Cell type changed from 'terminal lung fibroblasts' to 'IPF fibroblasts / MSCs'
Bivalent mechanoenhancer subset explicitly targeted (not all mechanoenhancers)
IPF vs normal fibroblast comparison added as internal control

evolved_hypotheses.title: YAP-BRD4 Condensate Volume Threshold Drives Looping-Independent Multi-Enhancer Hub Formation
evolved_hypotheses.confidence_change_rationale: IDR-deleted YAP control resolves verteporfin mechanism issue; quantitative threshold prediction now discriminable from competing mechanisms; iScience 2024 (PMID 38784009) confirms YAP condensates in actin-tension context
evolved_hypotheses.core_claim: The 86.2% of mechanoenhancer-gene connections lacking annotated chromatin loops are regulated via condensate-volume-dependent spatial co-localization. Below the critical stiffness threshold (~8–15 kPa), YAP-BRD4 condensates are too small to bridge the spatial gap between non-looped mechanoenhancers and target promoters. Above threshold, condensate volume crosses a size sufficient to physically capture multiple non-looped mechanoenhancers and their promoters, creating multi-enhancer hubs without cohesin-mediated extrusion.
evolved_hypotheses.mechanistic_chain: ECM stiffness (above ~8–15 kPa threshold) → YAP nuclear enrichment (supralinear per H3) → YAP-BRD4 condensate volume supralinear → condensate radius exceeds 200–500 nm → spatial capture of non-looped mechanoenhancers → multi-enhancer hub formation → cohesin-independent E-P activation
evolved_hypotheses.primary_prediction: Non-looped mechanoenhancer pairs (Cosgrove 2025) show <300 nm spatial proximity on stiff ECM (50 kPa); (1) NOT abolished by RAD21/WAPL knockdown (confirming cohesin-independence); (2) IS abolished by IDR-deleted YAP mutant (condensate-incompetent); (3) follows stiffness threshold above ~8–15 kPa; (4) absent on soft ECM (1 kPa, >500 nm distance)

grounded_claims.claim: 86.2% of mechanoenhancer-gene connections lack annotated chromatin loops
Endogenous YAP condensates form with BRD4 in response to actin cytoskeletal tension
Phase-separated condensates can mechanically restructure nearby chromatin via surface tension
YAP nuclear concentration increases ~4x from soft to stiff ECM
grounded_claims.source: Dupont et al. 2011 Nature + multiple reviews

grounded_claims.claim: Condensate volume scales cooperatively (supralinear) with TF concentration
grounded_claims.source: Shin et al. 2018, Cell + general LLPS cooperativity literature

grounded_claims.claim: Specific condensate radius threshold of 200–500 nm for non-looped mechanoenhancer-promoter pair capture
grounded_claims.source: [INFERRED] — based on polymer physics of chromatin spacing; requires STORM at Cosgrove 2025 loci

evolved_hypotheses.anomaly_addressed: Directly explains Cosgrove 2025 anomaly: 86.2% of mechanoenhancer-gene connections lack loops because dominant mechanism is condensate-volume-dependent spatial co-localization (stiffness-sensitive), not cohesin extrusion (stiffness-insensitive). Only 13.8% (pre-existing loops) active on soft ECM; 86.2% newly recruited on stiff ECM via condensate hub.
evolved_hypotheses.discriminant_from_alternatives: Quantitative threshold prediction + IDR-deleted YAP control discriminates from transcription factories (no threshold, no IDR dependence), eRNA bridges (no condensate cooperativity), and cohesin stripes (abolished by WAPL, not abolished in H5e prediction). Simultaneous STORM + ORCA experiment would test H3 (radius supralinear) AND H5e (radius > threshold = contact) in one experiment.
what_changed_vs_original: Verteporfin replaced by IDR-deleted YAP mutant as condensate-specific control
Quantitative threshold prediction added (specific stiffness and radius values)
Crossover with H3 supralinear encoding model added condensate-volume causality
WAPL/RAD21 knockdown added as cohesin-independence control
86.2% anomaly now DIRECTLY explained (was only partially addressed in H5)

evolved_hypotheses.title: KDM6B Bivalency Ratchet in IPF Fibrosis
Condensate Volume Threshold for Multi-Enhancer Hubs

final_hypothesis_set.diversity_assessment: HIGH — five distinct mechanistic classes; supralinear encoding (H3) + TF binding (H4) + ion channel kinase (H2) + KDM demethylase ratchet (H1e) + condensate-volume hub (H5e)

overlaps_resolved.resolution: H3 = HOW MUCH stiffness drives transcription (supralinear scaling); H5e = WHERE this happens (spatial co-localization mechanism). Complementary.
H2 = fast (<15 min), reversible, normal fibroblasts. H1e = slow (hours), irreversible, IPF/progenitor cells. Distinct.
H4 = MRTF-A TF binding → H3K27ac deposition. H1e = KDM6B → H3K27me3 erasure (derepression). Different marks, enzymes, cell contexts.
